prompt: Add a new URS: 'Users must be able to log in using their existing Google or Microsoft accounts.' Set this to critical priority. And delete FS-001, 'Basic User Authentication', as it will be replaced by the new URS.

expected.addRequirement: add a new URS: 'Users must be able to log in using their existing Google or Microsoft accounts.'
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Critical for the new URS regarding user login functionality with Google or Microsoft.
